---
title: "Mirjam Müller"
subtitle: "Phd Student"
category: "Phd Student"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: images/mirjam.jpeg
---

:::{#hero-heading}
I started my PhD in 2023 and joined the lab halfway through, bringing a background in mathematics and bioinformatics.

My research focuses on subtyping neurodegenerative diseases using both omics data and image analysis, with the goal of better understanding their underlying complexity.

When I am not at work, I am owned by two cats (my children), who demand most of my attention and keep life interesting.
:::
